title: coleus intraterraneus
intro: Coleus intraterraneus, also known as 'Terrace Solitaire', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its unique, compact growth habit and vibrant foliage. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coleus intraterraneus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Coleus intraterraneus typically involve drying and processing its leaves into teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
